tasks.title: Compliance API types + client functions
Compliance Zustand store + React Query hooks
Shared compliance components (badges, filter, index)
tasks.description: Create the shared components used across all compliance pages + the barrel index. ## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/compliance-badge.tsx` Universal badge component for all compliance statuses. Used in every table/list. ### Props: ```typescript interface ComplianceBadgeProps { type: 'priority' | 'status' | 'phase' | 'risk' | 'area' | 'compliance' | 'doc_status' | 'signature' | 'training' | 'matter_type' | 'obligation_type' | 'deadline'; value: string; size?: 'sm' | 'md'; // default 'sm' } ``` ### Color maps (all defined in this component): **Priority:** critical=red-500, high=orange-500, medium=yellow-500, low=green-500 **Compliance status:** compliant=green, partially_compliant=yellow, non_compliant=red, unknown=gray **Risk color:** green/yellow/orange/red/critical **Area code:** URE=blue, RODO=purple, AML=red, KSH=cyan, ESG=green, LABOR=amber, TAX=indigo, CONTRACT=teal, INTERNAL_AUDIT=gray **Matter status:** open=blue, researching=purple, analyzed=cyan, action_plan_ready=yellow, in_progress=orange, review=indigo, completed=green, closed=gray, on_hold=gray **Phase:** color per phase position (early=blue, mid=yellow, late=green, closed=gray) **Doc status:** draft=gray, review=yellow, approved=green, active=blue, superseded=gray, expired=red, archived=gray **Signature:** not_required=gray, pending=yellow, partially_signed=orange, signed=green, expired=red **Training status:** planned=gray, material_ready=blue, scheduled=cyan, in_progress=yellow, completed=green, cancelled=red ### Styling pattern: ```tsx {label} ``` Labels should be Polish translations where appropriate (e.g., 'critical' → 'Krytyczny', 'compliant' → 'Zgodny'). ## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/area-filter.tsx` Reusable area code dropdown used in 8+ pages. ### Props: ```typescript interface AreaFilterProps { value: string | null; onChange: (code: string | null) => void; className?: string; } ``` Render a `

tasks.title: Dashboard page + area status components
tasks.description:
Create the main compliance dashboard page and area-related components. ## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/compliance-dashboard.tsx` Dashboard overview component showing KPI cards and area grid. ### Data sources: - `useComplianceDashboard()` → KPI data - `useComplianceAreas()` → 9 compliance areas ### Layout: ``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ KPI Row (4 cards, grid-cols-4) │ │ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐│ │ │Obowiązki │ │Sprawy │ │Zaległe │ │Ryzyko ││ │ │52/60 │ │12 otwarte│ │3 terminy │ │Score: 45 ││ │ │compliant │ │ │ │RED if >0 │ │color ││ │ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘│ │ │ │ Area Status Grid (3×3 grid) │ │ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ │ │ │URE │ │RODO │ │AML │ │ │ │risk:HIGH │ │risk:MED │ │risk:LOW │ ... │ │ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ``` KPI cards use existing KpiCard component from `packages/ui/src/components/dashboard/kpi-card.tsx`. Risk score card color: green(<30), yellow(30-60), orange(60-80), red(>80). Loading: skeleton-pulse for KPI cards and area grid. ## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/area-status-card.tsx` Single area card in the dashboard grid. ### Props: ```typescript interface AreaStatusCardProps { area: ComplianceArea; // from @gilbertus/api-client onClick?: () => void; } ``` Render: - Area name (name_pl) as title - Risk level badge (using ComplianceBadge type='risk') - Governing body (text-secondary) - Key regulations as comma-separated list (truncated to 2, +N more) - Click → navigates to /compliance/areas/{code} Styling: `rounded-lg border border-[var(--border)] bg-[var(--surface)] p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-[var(--accent)] transition-colors` ## File 3: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/page.tsx` Dashboard page. Pattern: 'use client', RbacGate wrapping. ```tsx 'use client'; import { RbacGate } from '@gilbertus/ui'; import { ComplianceDashboard } from '@gilbertus/ui/compliance'; export default function CompliancePage() { return (

Compliance

 ); } ``` QuickLinks section below area grid: links to /compliance/matters, /compliance/obligations, /compliance/deadlines, /compliance/documents, /compliance/trainings, /compliance/risks, /compliance/raci, /compliance/reports. Use lucide-react icons. ## File 4: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/areas/[code]/page.tsx` Area detail page. Loads area data via `useComplianceArea(code)`. Tabs for: Przegląd, Obowiązki, Sprawy, Dokumenty, Terminy, Szkolenia, Ryzyka, RACI. Tab state from compliance store (areaDetailTab). Each tab renders filtered data for that area. Can reuse components from other tasks (MattersTable, ObligationsTable, etc.) with area_code pre-filter. For now, implement the page shell with tab navigation and the Overview tab (area info). Other tabs will use components from P4T5-P4T8 once available. Update `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/index.ts` to export new components.

tasks.title: Matters list + detail + phase timeline
tasks.description:
Create the matters list page, matter detail page, and related components.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/matters-table.tsx`

Filterable table of compliance matters.

### Data: from `useMatters()` hook (uses store filters)
### Filters: 3 FilterChips (status, area_code, priority) + toolbar

Table columns:
- Title (text, truncated)
- Type (ComplianceBadge type='matter_type')
- Area (ComplianceBadge type='area')
- Priority (ComplianceBadge type='priority')
- Status (ComplianceBadge type='status')
- Phase (ComplianceBadge type='phase')
- Updated (relative date)

Row click → navigate to `/compliance/matters/{id}`
Loading: animate-pulse skeleton rows

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/create-matter-modal.tsx`

Modal for creating new matter. Board+ only.

### Form fields:
- title: text input (required)
- matter_type: select with all 12 MatterType options
- area_code: AreaFilter component (required)
- priority: select (low/medium/high/critical), default 'medium'
- description: textarea (optional)
- source_regulation: text input (optional)

Submit → `useCreateMatter()` mutation → close modal + success toast
Cancel → close modal

Styling: overlay + centered modal card (max-w-lg). Follow pattern from `person-form-modal.tsx`.

## File 3: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/phase-timeline.tsx`

Horizontal phase stepper showing all 11 matter phases.

### Props:
```typescript
interface PhaseTimelineProps {
  currentPhase: MatterPhase;
}
```

Phases in order: initiation → research → analysis → planning → document_generation → approval → training → communication → verification → monitoring → closed

Polish labels: Inicjacja, Badanie, Analiza, Planowanie, Generowanie dok., Zatwierdzanie, Szkolenie, Komunikacja, Weryfikacja, Monitoring, Zamknięte

Each step: circle (completed=green, current=accent with pulse, future=gray) + connecting line between circles. Current phase name shown bold below.

Horizontal scrollable if needed on mobile.

## File 4: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/matter-actions.tsx`

Action buttons for matter detail page. Board+ only via RbacGate.

### Buttons:
- "Zbadaj" (Research) → POST /matters/{id}/research. Loading: 10-15s spinner with "Analizuję..." text
- "Następna faza" (Advance) → POST /matters/{id}/advance
- "Generuj raport" (Report) → POST /matters/{id}/report. Loading: 5-10s
- "Plan komunikacji" → POST /matters/{id}/communication-plan
- "Wyślij komunikację" → POST /matters/{id}/execute-communication (confirm dialog first)

All use useMutation hooks. On success: invalidate matter query, show toast.
Disable buttons during loading. Show Loader2 spinner in button.

## File 5: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/matter-detail.tsx`

Full matter view with header, phase timeline, actions, and tabs.

### Data: from `useMatter(id)` hook
### Tabs (from store.matterDetailTab):
- "Przegląd" — description, source_regulation
- "Analiza" — legal_analysis (render as markdown), risk_analysis (render JSON as key-value cards)
- "Plan działań" — action_plan[] (checklist with title, description, status)
- "Komunikacja" — communication_plan[] (recipients table with channels, timelines)
- "Raport" — obligations_report, consequences_report (markdown)

Loading: skeleton for header + tabs area.

## File 6: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/matters/page.tsx`

Matters list page with RbacGate.

```tsx
'use client';
RbacGate roles={['ceo', 'board', 'director', 'gilbertus_admin']}
PageHeader "Sprawy compliance" + CreateMatterButton (board+ gated)
MattersTable component
```

## File 7: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/matters/[id]/page.tsx`

Matter detail page.

```tsx
'use client';
const { id } = useParams();
RbacGate roles={['ceo', 'board', 'director', 'gilbertus_admin']}
Back link to /compliance/matters
MatterDetail component with id prop
```

Update `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/index.ts` to export all new components.

tasks.title: Obligations + Deadlines + Documents pages
tasks.description:
Create obligations, deadlines, and documents pages with their components.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/obligations-table.tsx`

Obligations list with filters and fulfill action.

### Data: `useObligations()` + `useOverdueObligations()` (when showOverdueOnly=true)
### Filters: area_code (AreaFilter), compliance_status (select), overdue toggle

Table columns:
- Title
- Area (ComplianceBadge type='area')
- Type (ComplianceBadge type='obligation_type')
- Frequency
- Next deadline (formatted date, RED text if past, YELLOW if within 7 days)
- Compliance status (ComplianceBadge type='compliance')
- Penalty (penalty_max_pln formatted as PLN currency, or '—')
- Fulfill button (board+ only, opens FulfillModal)

Loading: skeleton rows.

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/fulfill-modal.tsx`

Simple modal for fulfilling an obligation.

### Props:
```typescript
interface FulfillModalProps {
  obligationId: number;
  obligationTitle: string;
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
}
```

Form: single textarea for evidence_description (optional). Submit → `useFulfillObligation()` mutation → close + toast.

## File 3: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/deadline-calendar.tsx`

Timeline-style deadline view with urgency coloring.

### Data: `useDeadlines()` + `useOverdueDeadlines()`
### Controls: days_ahead selector (7/14/30/60/90 buttons), area filter

Layout:
1. **Overdue section** (red background-tinted, always on top)
   - DeadlineItem[] sorted by days_overdue desc
2. **Upcoming section** (grouped by week: "Ten tydzień", "Następny tydzień", "Za 2 tygodnie", etc.)
   - DeadlineItem[] within each group

DeadlineItem:
- Date (formatted, color: red if overdue, orange if <=3 days, yellow if <=7 days, default otherwise)
- Title
- Type badge (ComplianceBadge type='deadline')
- Status badge
- Area badge
- Days remaining text (e.g., "za 3 dni" or "2 dni temu")

## File 4: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/documents-table.tsx`

Documents list with status workflow indicators.

### Data: `useDocuments()` + `useStaleDocuments()` (when showStaleOnly=true)
### Filters: area_code, doc_type, status, stale toggle

Table columns:
- Title + version ("v1", "v2")
- Doc type (ComplianceBadge type='doc_status' — wait, use a label)
- Area (ComplianceBadge type='area')
- Status (ComplianceBadge type='doc_status')
- Signature (ComplianceBadge type='signature')
- Valid period (valid_from → valid_until, RED if expired)
- Review due (RED if past)
- Actions column (ceo only): Approve, Sign buttons

## File 5: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/generate-doc-modal.tsx`

AI document generation modal. CEO only.

### Form fields:
- matter_id: select (fetch matters list for dropdown)
- doc_type: select with all 16 DocType options
- title: text input (optional)
- template_hint: textarea (optional, hint for AI)
- signers: repeater (add rows with name + role inputs). Start with 1 row, + button to add more.
- valid_months: number input (default 12)

Submit → `useGenerateDocument()` mutation. **Important: 10-20s loading.** Show progress state in modal: "Generuję dokument..." with Loader2 spinner. Do NOT close modal until complete. On success → close + toast.

## File 6: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/document-actions.tsx`

Approve and sign action buttons for documents. CEO only.

### Props:
```typescript
interface DocumentActionsProps {
  documentId: number;
  currentStatus: DocStatus;
  signatureStatus: SignatureStatus;
}
```

- Approve button: visible when status is 'draft' or 'review'. → `useApproveDocument()`
- Sign button: visible when signature_status is 'pending' or 'partially_signed'. Opens small modal for signer_name input → `useSignDocument()`

## File 7: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/obligations/page.tsx`

Obligations page with RbacGate [ceo, board, director]. Shows ObligationsTable. Board+ gets create button.

## File 8: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/deadlines/page.tsx`

Deadlines page with RbacGate [ceo, board, director]. Shows DeadlineCalendar.

## File 9: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/documents/page.tsx`

Documents page with RbacGate [ceo, board, director]. Shows DocumentsTable. CEO gets GenerateDocButton.

Update `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/index.ts` to export all new components.

tasks.title: Trainings list + detail + status grid
tasks.description:
Create trainings list page, training detail page, and training status tracking.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/trainings-table.tsx`

Trainings list with filters.

### Data: `useTrainings()` hook (uses store filters: trainingArea, trainingStatus)
### Filters: area_code (AreaFilter), status (select)

Table columns:
- Title (clickable → /compliance/trainings/{id})
- Area (ComplianceBadge type='area')
- Training type (ComplianceBadge — map types: mandatory=red, awareness=blue, certification=purple, refresher=yellow, onboarding=green)
- Target audience (chips, truncated to 3 + "+N")
- Deadline (formatted, RED if past)
- Status (ComplianceBadge type='training')

Row click → navigate to `/compliance/trainings/{id}`
Loading: skeleton rows.

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/create-training-modal.tsx`

Modal for creating new training. Board+ only.

### Form fields:
- title: text input (required)
- area_code: AreaFilter (required)
- matter_id: select (optional, from matters list)
- training_type: select (mandatory/awareness/certification/refresher/onboarding)
- content_summary: textarea (optional)
- target_audience: multi-input (add audience groups, e.g., "zarząd", "pracownicy", "IT")
- deadline: date input (optional)
- generate_material: checkbox (boolean, "Generuj materiał szkoleniowy via AI")

Submit → `useCreateTraining()` mutation → close + toast.

## File 3: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/training-status-grid.tsx`

Per-person completion tracking grid.

### Props:
```typescript
interface TrainingStatusGridProps {
  trainingId: number;
}
```

### Data: `useTrainingStatus(trainingId)` → { training, records: TrainingRecord[] }

Render:
- Training header: title, area, type, deadline, overall status
- Content summary (if any, rendered as text)
- Person grid (table):
  - Person name
  - Status badge (assigned/notified/started/completed/overdue/exempted)
  - Notified date
  - Completed date
  - Score (number or '—')
  - Complete button (director+): opens confirm with person_id + optional score input → `useCompleteTraining()` mutation

Color coding:
- completed: green row tint
- overdue: red row tint
- in progress/started: yellow row tint
- assigned/notified: default

Loading: skeleton grid.

## File 4: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/trainings/page.tsx`

Trainings list page.

```tsx
'use client';
RbacGate roles={['ceo', 'board', 'director', 'gilbertus_admin']}
PageHeader "Szkolenia compliance"
  + RbacGate [ceo, board]: CreateTrainingButton
TrainingsTable
```

## File 5: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/trainings/[id]/page.tsx`

Training detail page.

```tsx
'use client';
const { id } = useParams();
RbacGate roles={['ceo', 'board', 'director', 'gilbertus_admin']}
Back link to /compliance/trainings
TrainingStatusGrid trainingId={Number(id)}
```

Update `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/index.ts` to export new components.

tasks.title: Risks + Heatmap + RACI + Reports + Scan pages
tasks.description:
Create remaining pages: risks with heatmap, RACI matrix, reports viewer, and regulatory scan.

## File 1: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/risks-table.tsx`

Risk register table.

### Data: `useRisks()` hook (uses store filters: riskArea, riskStatus)
### Filters: area_code (AreaFilter), status (open/mitigated/accepted/closed)

Table columns:
- Risk title
- Area (ComplianceBadge type='area')
- Likelihood (text with color: very_high=red, high=orange, medium=yellow, low=green, very_low=green)
- Impact (text with color: catastrophic=red, major=orange, moderate=yellow, minor=green, negligible=green)
- Risk score (number, bold, color-coded by score range: <4 green, 4-9 yellow, 10-16 orange, >16 red)
- Status (ComplianceBadge type='risk')
- Current controls (truncated text)
- Mitigation plan (truncated text)
- Linked matter (matter_title, clickable → /compliance/matters/{matter_id})

## File 2: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/risk-heatmap.tsx`

Interactive 5×5 risk probability×impact matrix.

### Data: `useRiskHeatmap()` → { areas: RiskHeatmapArea[], total_risks, overall_avg }

For the matrix itself, also use `useRisks()` to plot individual risks on the grid.

### 5×5 Grid:
- X-axis (columns): Impact — negligible, minor, moderate, major, catastrophic
- Y-axis (rows): Likelihood — very_high (top), high, medium, low, very_low (bottom)

Each cell:
- Count of risks at that intersection
- Background color intensity based on risk zone:
  - Green zone (bottom-left): score 1-4
  - Yellow zone: score 5-9
  - Orange zone: score 10-16
  - Red zone (top-right): score 17-25
- Clickable: filters risk register to show matching risks

Below the matrix:
- Area summary cards (from heatmap API):
  - Area name
  - Risk count
  - Avg score
  - Max score
  - Critical count (red highlight if >0)
  - Color dot

- Overall stats: total_risks, overall_avg

### Implementation:
Use CSS grid (grid-cols-5, grid-rows-5). No external charting library needed.

## File 3: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/raci-matrix.tsx`

Editable RACI grid.

### Data: `useRaci()` hook (uses store.raciArea filter)
### Mutation: `useUpsertRaci()`

Transform flat RaciEntry[] into matrix:
- Rows: areas (from ComplianceAreaCode) or matters (grouped)
- Columns: unique people (from person_id/person_name in raci data)
- Cells: RaciRole badge (R=blue, A=red, C=yellow, I=green) or empty

Cell click → RaciEditPopover:
- Role buttons: R / A / C / I / Remove
- Notes input (optional)
- Save → POST /compliance/raci (upsert)
- Optimistic update: immediately show new role, revert on error

Header: AreaFilter for filtering.
Styling: table with sticky first column, horizontal scroll for many people.

## File 4: `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/report-viewer.tsx`

Report display component with tab switching.

### Data:
- `useDailyReport()` — returns { report: string | null }. May be null outside business hours.
- `useWeeklyReport()` — returns areas[] with compliance stats
- `useAreaReport(code)` — full area report

### Tabs (from store.reportActiveTab):

**"Dzienny":**
- If report is null: "Brak raportu dziennego" message
- If available: render emoji-formatted text (preserve whitespace/newlines)

**"Tygodniowy":**
- generated_at timestamp
- Table: area code | name | compliant/partial/non-compliant obligations | opened/closed matters | met/missed deadlines | generated/approved docs | open risks
- Summary row at bottom
- whatsapp_sent indicator

**"Obszar":**
- Area selector dropdown (AreaFilter)
- When area selected: full area report rendered (multi-section with markdown)
- Sections: area info, obligations, matters, documents, deadlines, trainings, risks, raci

## File 5: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/risks/page.tsx`

Risks page with tab navigation (Rejestr / Heatmap). RbacGate [ceo, board].

```tsx
'use client';
Tab navigation from store.riskActiveTab
'register' tab → RisksTable
'heatmap' tab → RiskHeatmap
```

## File 6: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/raci/page.tsx`

RACI matrix page. RbacGate [ceo, board].

```tsx
'use client';
PageHeader "Matryca RACI"
RaciMatrix
```

## File 7: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/reports/page.tsx`

Reports page. RbacGate [ceo, board, director].

```tsx
'use client';
PageHeader "Raporty compliance"
ReportViewer
```

## File 8: `apps/web/app/(app)/compliance/scan/page.tsx`

Regulatory scan page. RbacGate [ceo, board].

### Layout:
- PageHeader "Skan regulacyjny"
- Hours selector: button group (6h / 12h / 24h / 48h / 72h), default 24
- Scan button → `useScanRegulatory()` mutation
- Loading state: "Skanuję..." with Loader2, variable time
- Results panel (after scan completes):
  - Summary cards: scanned_chunks, regulatory_found, matters_created
  - Details list:
    - ScanResultItem[]: title, area badge, matter_type badge, priority badge, action text, link to created matter

Update `packages/ui/src/components/compliance/index.ts` to export all new components.
